params.focusReason: BASE-WEAPON faithfulness basis (docs/data/clean-weapons.md) — these units' kits contribute ZERO damage, so the fight measures the engine's bare weapon model. idoll-ocean focused as the SMG cell; boss Iron is the only element neutral for all six.

method: ffmpeg full-res single frames at fixed timestamps (60fps source, 1206x2622 portrait, rotation 90 -> decodes 2622x1206). PRIMARY READ = the AMMO COUNTER as the shot clock, not popups: crop around the crosshair at 0.5s intervals. NB the ammo box is anchored to the crosshair and MOVES across the frame with the boss's range band — a fixed crop silently misses it, so it must be relocated per sample.

popups.note: white/plain; two overlapping instances of the same value

notes:
HEADLINE (the reason this record exists): idoll-ocean's real SMG cadence is EXACTLY 20.0 rounds/s — 10 rounds per 0.5s, dead linear, measured in TWO separate range bands. The sim ships 24/s. Mechanism: 1440 rpm = 2.5 frames/shot at 60fps, and SMG is the ONLY weapon in the roster whose datamined rate_of_fire is not a whole frame count; ceil(2.5)=3 frames gives exactly 20.0/s. Engine arm SMGQUANT=1 (default OFF). Full evidence + whole-board A/B: docs/probe-runs.md section 'SMG CADENCE'. 

SECOND, UNRESOLVED OBSERVATION — her ATK basis may be ~1.4% low. The 7694 popup is a plain ranged normal, so it should read baseAtk x 8.73% x 1.3. The modelled baseAtk 68788 predicts 7806.8; the observed 7694 implies baseAtk ~67795, i.e. 1.44% BELOW the model. That is the right size for the rarity ceiling being slightly off — her '0 dupes / core 0' state is OWNER-SUPPLIED and unverifiable from the repo (data/characters.json carries NO unit-rarity field). A popup therefore pins her true in-fight ATK independently and could refine the ceiling. NOT acted on: single popup, crit/core colour not rigorously confirmed, and the discrepancy is small enough that a mis-set range-bonus term is an equally live explanation. Do NOT tune anything to it without a proper lattice read.
